name: ai-voice-studio
title: AI Voice Studio
description: Read and generate speech from Raycast with Alibaba Cloud Qwen-TTS, MiniMax, Xiaomi MiMo, and OpenAI voices, speed control, and focused provider defaults.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Read selected text, or clipboard text if no selection is available, with the default TTS provider. Trigger again to stop.

commands.name: setup-voice-defaults
commands.title: Setup Voice Defaults
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Configure the default provider, model, voice, speed, and provider defaults in a focused Raycast form.

commands.name: test-voice-setup
commands.title: Test Voice Setup
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Synthesize and play a short sample with the current default provider to verify API access, latency, and playback.

commands.name: qwen-quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read with Qwen-TTS
commands.subtitle: Qwen-TTS
commands.description: Read selected or clipboard text with your default Qwen-TTS voice. Run again to stop playback.

commands.name: qwen-read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with Qwen-TTS Voice
commands.subtitle: Qwen-TTS
commands.description: Browse Qwen-TTS voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: qwen-select-voice
commands.title: Set Qwen-TTS Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: Qwen-TTS
commands.description: Choose and preview the Qwen-TTS voice used by Quick Read when Qwen-TTS is the default provider.

commands.name: minimax-quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read with MiniMax
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Read selected or clipboard text with your default MiniMax voice via streaming T2A WebSocket. Run again to stop playback.

commands.name: minimax-read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with MiniMax Voice
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Browse MiniMax voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: minimax-select-voice
commands.title: Set MiniMax Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Choose and preview the MiniMax voice used by Quick Read when MiniMax is the default provider.

commands.name: tts-studio
commands.title: TTS Studio
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Generate and play MiMo speech from typed, selected, or pasted text, with voice, emotion, and style controls.

commands.name: mimo-quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read with MiMo
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Read selected or clipboard text with your default MiMo voice. Run again to stop playback.

commands.name: mimo-read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with MiMo Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Browse MiMo voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: mimo-select-voice
commands.title: Set MiMo Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Choose and preview the MiMo voice used by Quick Read when MiMo is the default provider.

commands.name: openai-tts-studio
commands.title: OpenAI TTS Studio
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Generate and play OpenAI speech from typed, selected, or pasted text, with voice, tone, delivery, and style controls.

commands.name: openai-quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read with OpenAI
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Read selected or clipboard text with your default OpenAI voice. Run again to stop playback.

commands.name: openai-read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with OpenAI Voice
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Browse OpenAI voices and read selected or clipboard text aloud.

commands.name: openai-select-voice
commands.title: Set OpenAI Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Choose and preview the OpenAI voice used by Quick Read when OpenAI is the default provider.

commands.name: stop-reading
commands.title: Stop Reading
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Stop the current TTS playback.

commands.name: speed-up-reading
commands.title: Increase Reading Speed
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Increase reading speed by 0.25x for the default provider.

commands.name: slow-down-reading
commands.title: Decrease Reading Speed
commands.subtitle: AI Voice Studio
commands.description: Decrease reading speed by 0.25x for the default provider.

commands.name: qwen-status
commands.title: Qwen-TTS Reading Status
commands.subtitle: Qwen-TTS
commands.description: Show Qwen-TTS playback status, speed, and controls in the menu bar.

commands.name: minimax-status
commands.title: MiniMax Reading Status
commands.subtitle: MiniMax
commands.description: Show MiniMax playback status, speed, and controls in the menu bar.

commands.name: mimo-status
commands.title: MiMo Reading Status
commands.subtitle: MiMo
commands.description: Show MiMo playback status, speed, and controls in the menu bar.

commands.name: openai-status
commands.title: OpenAI Reading Status
commands.subtitle: OpenAI
commands.description: Show OpenAI playback status, speed, and controls in the menu bar.

preferences.name: minimaxApiKey
preferences.title: MiniMax API Key
preferences.description: MiniMax Open Platform API key for T2A v2 (HTTP + WebSocket).

preferences.name: dashscopeApiKey
preferences.title: DashScope API Key
preferences.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope API key for Qwen-TTS.

scripts.verify: npm run verify:runtime && npm run verify:provider-settings && npm run verify:provider-env && npm run verify:fast-paths && npm run verify:provider-contracts && npm run verify:test-voice-setup && npm run verify:live-smoke-guardrails && npm run verify:pipeline-lookahead && npm run verify:audio-player && npm run build && npm run lint && tsc --noEmit && npm audit && node scripts/write-verification-evidence.mjs local-verify
